raw_signals.description: A terminal-native devcontainer CLI built for the AI agent era. Drop-in devcontainer CLI replacement in Rust — port forwarding, SSH agent, and credential forwarding without VS Code.
Persistent Claude Code agents with scheduling, sessions, memory, and Telegram.
Shelley is a coding agent
Desktop coding agent driven from Telegram, Discord, Slack, Mattermost, Feishu / Lark, or LINE. Codex-compatible — runs on your laptop, lives in your phone.
Structured, spec-driven development workflow for AI coding agents.
Auto your development workflow with coding AI agents & CLI.
The most versatile and configurable coding agent, free and open source forever.
The native macOS terminal that keeps your sessions running and tells you when a coding agent needs you. GPU-rendered, scriptable, agent-aware.
deepseek标配coding agent、原生支持模型路由、CodeGraph代码图谱、OCR截图识别、自动上下文压缩、最佳工作模式选择等功能，从根本上节省Token

🤖 Autonomous Multi-Agent AI Workspace in your terminal. Codes, researches, and executes real tasks with 40+ tools and 280+ skills And Some Captcha Resolver With Only Vision Mode Any Captcha And Opening A Browser And Full Control Of It
Production ML template with 32 encoded anti-patterns, multi-cloud K8s, agent rules (AUTO/CONSULT/STOP), and supply-chain security for Windsurf, Claude Code, and Cursor.
Local-first autonomous coding agent that plans, executes, validates, and finishes software tasks end-to-end.
Persistent memory for AI coding agents — self-hosted, MCP-native, append-only. One Docker image, one SQLite file.
Live, open-source benchmark for comparing AI coding agents on real GitHub issues
2026 swarm Agent 年，swarm Agent 、Agent team、 ai coding、skill、memory、evolve、agentic RL 等 AI Agent集合
An agentic harness that runs your coding agents from idea to merged PR. Nine inspectable stages, markdown artefacts at every  step, drop in by hand whenever you want. Claude / Codex / Pi.
15 frontend craft skills for AI coding agents. Interviews or audits you into a real design system, then verifies typography, OKLCH color, states, forms, charts, a11y, and anti-slop.

Local-first 🧠 memory for Hermes Agent that lives in your Obsidian vault and remembers project context. Nightly 😴 dream passes turn repeat corrections into confirmed preferences with measurable confidence. Adapters ship for Claude Code, Codex, and OpenClaw, with an MCP server for anything else.
Local-first persistent memory for AI agents — store, recall, and consolidate knowledge across sessions using FAISS, SQLite, and any LLM. MCP server for coding agents and any MCP client.
A hardened Docker sandbox setup for coding agents
Open-source alternative to Claude Co-Work built by Claude Fable 5/Claude Mythos 5. Autonomous computer-use agents for browser automation, desktop control, and agentic workflows.
💻 Control AI agents to automate tasks on computers, enabling true autonomy with browser, terminal, and desktop interaction. Perfect for developers.
⚡️next-generation personal AI assistant powered by LLM, RAG and agent loops, supporting computer-use, browser-use and coding agent, demo: https://demo.openagentai.org
Computer-use, but for the iPhone — AI agents (and your browser) see and drive a real phone over macOS iPhone Mirroring. Low-latency WebRTC video, near-native touch, HTTP API + MCP. Rust, self-hosted.
Celesto provides secure, isolated computers that AI agents can use to browse, code, and get real work done.
Auto-Use Computer Use — drives your OS, browser, scours the web, writes your code. One agent, end to end.
Open-source local-VLM browser agent. AT-tree-first routing with VLM fallback, refusals enforced in code, honest benchmarks including the failure atlas.

MCP server that gives any LLM its own computer — managed Docker workspaces with live browser, terminal, code execution, document skills, and autonomous sub-agents. Self-hosted, open-source, pluggable into any model.
A cookbook of recipes pairing Claude Managed Agents with Kernel cloud browsers — parallel computer-use agent swarms, with API keys secured via Vaults.

🛡️ AI-powered phishing detection platform that safely analyzes suspicious URLs inside isolated sandboxes using browser automation, computer vision, threat intelligence, and machine learning to detect and neutralize next-generation phishing attacks.
Agent-Sandbox is an E2B compatible easy-to-use enterprise-grade sandboxes for AI Agents. Allows Agents to securely run untrusted LLM-generated Code, Browser use, Computer use, and deploy Website etc.

A firewall for browser agents. Chrome extension that detects, monitors, and controls AI agents in your browser. Identifies Playwright, Puppeteer, Selenium, Anthropic Computer Use, and OpenAI Operator without the agent identifying itself.
browser-use for Windows desktops — AI agents see and control any Windows app via UI Automation. The missing piece for computer-use agents.

Trace Guard silently intercepts every HTTP/HTTPS request, injects a behavioral telemetry script, and blocks bots — including sophisticated agentic browsers driven by Vision-Language Models (VLMs, Playwright, Puppeteer, Claude Computer Use).
a full agent-first browser built in Rust: no CDP, no Chrome, no browser-use required
Reliable Agents is a guide to understanding agentic browser and computer use, featuring benchmarks of new and existing tools.
Computer Use / Mobile Use / Browser Use / Game Agent
MoLing is a computer-use and browser-use based MCP server. It is a locally deployed, dependency-free office AI assistant.
A Kernel application that demonstrates Computer Use Agent (CUA) capabilities using Google's Gemini 2.5 model with Stagehand for browser automation.

Hands-free browser automation system integrating Gemini’s CUA (Computer Use Agent) contraoled via Voice Agent. Users speak commands, and the CUA autonomously executes browser interactions via playwright (headless browser tool)
From Agent to Agency — 一个 AI 做不了的事，一群 AI 可以。Multi-Agent Collaboration Platform.
Cross-runtime skills for Claude Code, Codex, and multi-agent workflows.
Keel turns coding agents into work owners: a project-neutral issue-to-done workflow backbone.
Browse agents and skills on the web. Install them with one command.
Local handoff runner for Codex and Claude Code: plan, execute, verify, and inspect every agent handoff on disk.
Orchestrate multi-agent teams using document-driven workflows, defined role boundaries, and standardized handoff contracts for Hermes.
Build multi-tenant AI agent platforms with isolated execution, tiered memory management, and secure sandboxed tool processing for enterprise workflows.
AI-powered development tools. 19 agents, 22 commands, 30 skills, 1 hook, 1 MCP server for code review, research, design, and workflow automation.

Safe-by-default Python CLI and MCP server that generates, checks, and updates AGENTS.md / RUNBOOK.md and AI-ready docs (docs/ai, packs, OKF) for AI coding agents, with marker-based patches, diff-first workflow, conservative repo autodetect, and optional LLM-enhanced context.
Standardize AI agent workflows with reusable skills, templates, and best practices for team-wide reuse and steady iteration
Open-source alternative to Claude Co-Work built by Claude Fable 5/Claude Mythos 5. Autonomous computer-use agents for browser automation, desktop control, and agentic workflows.
Build a full OpenClaw AI agent with memory, self-healing, voice, automation, and built-in diagnostics
Generates safe NC G-code from natural language with multi-agent LangGraph workflow for CNC process planning, tool selection, and path optimization
Orchestrate multiple agents to execute Claude Code workflows with cross-model verification for reliable AI code automation.
Build and manage self-organizing multi-agent systems for OpenClaw to improve automation and coordination in complex workflows.
Provide modular marketing skills for strategic planning, channel execution, and automation using Claude Code in a full-stack marketing workflow.
Provide intelligent command-line workflows using multi-agent automation with built-in support for Python, Rust, Go, and shell languages.
A delegation environment for orchestrating AI coding agents. Manage Claude, Gemini, and Codex sessions across git   worktrees with integrated terminals, context injection, and workflow automation.
Automate social media tasks using AI agents that coordinate workflows for efficient content management and scheduling.
Automate binary analysis by coordinating LLM agents with Ghidra, enabling scalable and precise reverse engineering workflows.

Scientra OS turns research papers into a searchable knowledge ecosystem. Import PDFs, extract structured knowledge, build research maps, discover related work, and interact with your literature through AI-powered agents.
An open-source Digital Office of the CEO. Communications, scheduling, research, and knowledge work with governance-first architecture.
🔍 Accelerate research using a Multi Agent System for efficient context engineering with DeepAgent and LangChain's library.
AI content workspace for Chinese creators: desktop writing, research, prompt   library, knowledge base, and multi-model workflows.
Research Knowledge Agent — MCP server + REST API + React dashboard for AI-assisted research orchestration

Claude Code plugin for Elixir/Phoenix/LiveView — 20 specialist agents, Iron Laws enforcement, and Tidewave MCP integration. Plan features with parallel research agents, execute with automatic verification, review with 4-agent parallel audits, and capture learnings as reusable knowledge.
Personal knowledge wiki with 24/7 research agents. Claude + Ollama + iCloud + PWA.
One prompt → auto web research → knowledge graph → multi-agent population simulation → forecast report. Live demo: https://linroger.github.io/DeepResearchForecast/

A CLI agent that runs a six-phase knowledge cycle (AKC) over its own logs — every promotion passes through a human approval gate. Runs entirely on a local 9B model. Security by absence — dangerous capabilities were never built.
Your infinite canvas workspace for agents, tasks, knowledge, and research. An infinite canvas for Claude Code, Codex, terminals, tasks, and notes.
Knowledge agent for LLMs — online research + local accumulation, gets smarter over time. MCP-ready.

LibraryOfBabel is a comprehensive system that processes personal digital libraries (EPUBs and audiobooks) into a searchable knowledge base. It enables AI research agents to query across thousands of books instantly, making literature review and research dramatically more efficient.
The python library for research and development in NLP, multimodal LLMs, Agents, ML, Knowledge Graphs, and more.

An intelligent research assistant based on the Agentic paradigm, which leverages multi-agent collaboration for in-depth web searching and knowledge discovery, and automatically generates comprehensive research reports.
Research agent for Open Code which gives ability to process 50+ results for each request and search for domain knowledge data
Research agent for Claude Code which gives ability to process 50+ results for each request and search for domain knowledge data
Multi-agent data assistant built on CrewAI. Two endpoints: /api/analyze (researcher → analyst → writer) and /api/knowledge/query (single agent). FastAPI backend + a CLI that hits the same code.

openJiuwen DeepSearch is a knowledge-enhanced deep search and research framework with industry-leading chunk-level citation and traceable reasoning capabilities, delivering precise agentic search and research abilities.

Self-hosted open-source platform for AI-powered survey interviews. Voice-to-voice and text chat agents with semi-structured interview guides, multi-provider LLM support (OpenAI, Gemini, Scaleway), RAG knowledge base, and Twilio telephony. Built for researchers. Docker, one command, full control.

deep orchestration and versatile agents for deep research  is an enterprise-grade, multi-agent research automation system that aggregates knowledge from Web, ArXiv, GitHub, HuggingFace, and academic publications .
🛒 Explore the AI Shopping Agent to compare prices and generate smart purchase reports across top e-commerce platforms effortlessly.
BuyWhere MCP server — search and compare products from Singapore, SEA, and US markets via Model Context Protocol. Cross-border e-commerce product catalog for AI agents.
Chinese e-commerce MCP servers — let AI agents read merchant business data (Ocean Engine, Douyin Shop, JD.com, Taobao, Pinduoduo). 电商经营数据 MCP 连接器。
A shopping skill for AI agents, powered by the Universal Commerce Protocol.

E-commerce skills for AI agents — product research, marketing automation, supply chain optimization, and business analytics for online sellers across Amazon, Shopify, Etsy, TikTok Shop, and all platforms.
AI Agent Coffee Shop Commerce Platform Platform AI untuk otomatisasi order, customer service, loyalty customer, dan manajemen multi cabang coffee shop.

ClicShopping AI(tm) is OpenSource and powerfull Solution AI  e-commerce B2B / B2C / B2B-B2C  agentic. The solution is based on a modern, responsive design that will allow you to have a great website on all mobile device, desktop and easy to install.

AI-native conversational commerce platform. Evolves shopping from "search" to "conversation" — shortening decisions from 8 clicks to 1 sentence. Powered by LangGraph, MCP & RAG multi-agent collaboration. Built with FastAPI, Next.js, PostgreSQL & Qwen/Openai. The future of e-commerce.
Machine-readable merchant verification infrastructure for AI shopping agents and agentic commerce systems.

Merchanta AI is an AI Representation Optimizer which enables merchants to understand how AI shopping agents see, rank, and suggest their products. Merchanta AI uses semantic analysis, buyer intent simulating, metadata diagnoses, and AI visibility score to make store future-ready for AI-driven commerce.
Open specification for AI-driven commerce: scoring methodology, conformance levels, and reference dataset for agentic shopping agent visibility.
Open dataset of cross-agent shopping recommendations: anonymized captures across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Mistral, DeepSeek for benchmark research.

This repository implements an agentic commerce platform that lets users browse products, ask questions, and manage a shopping cart entirely through Telegram. Incoming messages are queued via Redis and processed by horizontally scalable workers that route each request through a central shopping agent. The system is composed of five cooperating agent
Carta is an AI-powered personal shopping agent that helps users search, compare, and save money across multiple Indian e-commerce marketplaces.

End-to-end TapPay shopping and checkout skill that combines wallet readiness, merchant selection, browser checkout execution, payment field handling, and stale-state recovery into one continuous contract.
Agentic AI-powered e-commerce platform with conversational shopping, real-time price negotiation, and automated product onboarding using LangChain, LangGraph, and Gemini AI.

Norce Commerce Agent SDK: open-source backend + embeddable UI widget for building conversational shopping assistants on top of Norce Commerce via the Norce MCP Server. Includes an Agent BFF, tool integrations, and reference implementations to help partners add agentic product discovery and cart flows to webshops.

Stoa is an open-source commerce engine for humans and agents. Built on Go for raw performance — ships with a Svelte storefront, admin panel, REST API, and native MCP support so AI agents can shop natively. Self-hosted. Extensible. Fast.
A curated list of AI shopping agents, platform policies, and the agentic commerce landscape.
Simple agentic shopping agent to track prices and trigger alerts
10 AI agent skills for Claude Code — waterfall email enrichment, TAM building, signal discovery, job change detection, and outbound automation. Powered by Deepline CLI with 28+ GTM data providers.
205 production GTM agent skills across 25 categories — sales, outbound, RevOps, PLG, CS, automation, MCP
Open-source, terminal-native RevOps agent. Automates CRM tasks, prospect research, and sales workflows using your own API keys. Fully local and completely free.

Claude skill for B2B lead generation — search, filter & export newly registered US small to medium sized businesses via SMB Sales Boost API. Built for cold outreach, GTM, and sales prospecting agents.
Autonomous AI sales agent powered by Claude Code. Finds prospects, writes cold emails, sends campaigns, handles replies, books meetings. No API keys needed — runs on your Claude Max subscription.

AI sales agent that builds psychological digital twins of prospects and runs Monte Carlo simulations to find the optimal sales strategy. Cold email optimizer, sales call simulator, AI prospecting tool. Sponsored by HappyCapy.

An AI-powered sales automation tool that transforms manual prospect research into an intelligent, streamlined workflow. Built with Next.js, the Vercel AI SDK, and Apollo.io to help sales and marketing teams generate high-quality leads with personalized outreach.

RD-Agent is a robust tool designed to streamline your research and development workflows. Explore the project, check out the live demo, and contribute to its growth on GitHub! 🐙✨

Infi is your personal AI-powered agent for stock and portfolio research, built to help you not just analyze investments, but truly understand them. The agent submits every claim as a source-backed block through tools Infi controls. The report is assembled from those blocks, not parsed from prose.
💰 AIFi (AI Finance) is an agent-first workspace for compounding investment research and insight.

Qlib is an AI-oriented Quant investment platform that aims to use AI tech to empower Quant Research, from exploring ideas to implementing productions. Qlib supports diverse ML modeling paradigms, including supervised learning, market dynamics modeling, and RL, and is now equipped with https://github.com/microsoft/RD-Agent to automate R&D process.

AI quantitative trading platform for crypto, stocks, and forex with backtesting, live trading, market data, and multi-agent research.vibe-trading ,trading-agents,ai-trader,ai-trading

The FP&A toolbelt for AI coding agents. Claude Code or Codex does the thinking; openfpa gives it a tested finance kernel, durable company memory, and a Karpathy inspired research loop that improves forecasts against your actuals. By Guiderail and Jeff Brines.

NEXUS is an open-source, multi-persona AI agent orchestration platform & delegation framework. Integrates a Chief of Staff with specialized agents (Travel, Research, Legal, Finance, Vision, etc) directly into Web, Slack, & OpenClaw. Built on Bun, Hono, React, and TypeScript.

An institutional-grade AI Quantitative Research & Trading Operating System built with FastAPI, Next.js, Multi-Agent AI, Quantitative Finance Analytics, Portfolio Optimization, and Real-Time Market Intelligence.

You’ll begin by building practical personal productivity agents . From there, you’ll move into writing, research, and analysis agents that generate content, summarize complex information, and extract insights from data. As the course progresses, you’ll build business-focused agents for operations, marketing, HR, legal, finance.
